title: To My Dear Brother Eldridge Stanton (Junior)
content:
WHO DIED BRAVELY AT NIAGARA, ON THE AFTERNOON OF SUNDAY, FEBRUARY 4TH, 1912.

    No tears for thee, no tears, or sighs,
    Or breaking heart - 
    But smiles, that thou so well that bitter hour
    Didst play thy part!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Virna Sheard delivers a powerful performance in "To My Dear Brother Eldridge Stanton (Junior)"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
